simplesync.config.title: SimpleSync Configuration
simplesync.tutorial.title: Google Drive API Setup Guide
simplesync.tutorial.step1: 1. Go to §b§nconsole.cloud.google.com§r and create a project.
simplesync.tutorial.step2: 2. Search for '§b§nGoogle Drive API§r' and click Enable.
simplesync.tutorial.step3: 3. OAuth Consent Screen: External / Test / Add 'drive.file' scope.
simplesync.tutorial.step3b: 3b. In that same screen, add your Google account under 'Test Users'.
simplesync.tutorial.step4: 4. Go to Credentials -> Create Credentials -> OAuth Client ID (TV / Desktop App).
simplesync.tutorial.step5: 5. Download the JSON, rename it to 'client_secret.json'.
simplesync.tutorial.step6: 6. Place it in §b§nconfig/simplesync/§r, click Connect, and enter the code shown.
